description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic on a large bifolio with a few lines in Arabic. Dating is 18th- or 19th-century based on the Ottoman kurush reference in Arabic and perhaps post-1707 if the word "גנזרילי" on the verso was intended as a reference to the gold cinzirli (the spelling is somewhat unclear for this to be certain). Some of the account entries mention names, such as: Abdaraḥman al-Maghribī and Raḥamīm Gershon. MCD.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בJRL.
